response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-02:17 is instrumental/introduction. 02:17-05:00 is a vocal performance. 2. Identified the song as 'Flashpoint' by the group ReGLOSS based on visual cues and on-screen text. 3. Confirmed 'Flashpoint' is an original song by ReGLOSS (composed by oh tora). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and English translations of 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS. 5. Successfully retrieved the complete lyrics and translation from reliable sources (Uta-Net, Namu.wiki). 6. Mapped scenes and populated the JSON schema with retrieved data.
response.global_summary: A concert video featuring the Japanese VTuber group ReGLOSS (members Otonose Kanade, Ichijou Ririka, Juufuutei Raden, Todoroki Hajime, and Hibiki Ao) performing a mix of instrumental, introduction, and vocal segments, culminating in their performance of their original song 'Flashpoint'.

scenes.description: The video starts with an instrumental introduction, featuring crowd participation with lightsticks. Various members of the group are introduced on screen.
ReGLOSS performs their original song 'Flashpoint'. The members sing and dance while holographic panels are displayed on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
紙細工の花びらを
ある人は美しいとぼやいた
この地球の横顔は
どう見えてる？キミの世界では
現実を逆さまにして
失くしそうなモノだけ振り落とした ah
手のひらで拾い上げようとしたら
指の隙間すり抜け消えてった
“形あるものだけが
すべてじゃないけど
形あるものが
どうしても欲しいよ”
この世界を(da-ra-da)
変えることは(la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど(da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて咲いて実って枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから(da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい
言葉の綾を紡ぐ人
優しさを編む人
それぞれの正義を
解ってあげたい
絡まった矛盾と
辻褄合わせ
そんな刹那を抱え
今日を生きてる
分け合った灯り
隣から隣へ
やがてひとつに
夜の帳へ
息を吹き込んだ
キミとじゃなきゃだめなんだ ah
このまま寝てしまうには
もったいないほど
優しさに包まった
夜だった
はっきり浮かび上がった夢の輪郭
それは確かに愛だった
ツキが見守る今夜
そっと一瞬を抱き締めた
煌めく星
色や形 温度や意味
まるで何もかも違うボクらだけど
きっと最後には
この音で繋がってる
この世界を(da-ra-da)
変えることは(la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど(da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて咲いて実って枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから(da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい
i'll always be by your side
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Paper-craft petals
Someone grumbled that they were beautiful
This profile of the Earth
How does it look? In your world
I turned reality upside down
And shook off only the things I was about to lose, ah
When I tried to pick them up with my palm
They slipped through my fingers and vanished
“Things with form aren't
Everything, but
I really, truly
Want things with form”
I certainly can't change
(da-ra-da) this world
(la-la-la-la)
(da-ra-da) but
I should be able to change the world inside you
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and withering
Because not a single thing can be missing (da-ra-da-da)
If you can smile at me in the end
That is enough for me
Those who weave the subtle nuances of words
Those who knit kindness
I want to understand
Each of your justices
Intertwined contradictions and
Stretching the truth
Holding onto such fleeting moments
I'm living today
The light we shared
From one side to the other
Eventually becoming one
Into the curtain of the night
I breathed life into it
It has to be with you, ah
It was a night wrapped in kindness
So precious that
I didn't want to just go to sleep like this
The outline of the dream that clearly floated up
That was certainly love
Tonight, while the moon watches over us
I gently held onto that instant
Twinkling stars
Color, shape, temperature, meaning
We are completely different in every way
But surely in the end
We are connected by this sound
I certainly can't change
(da-ra-da) this world
(la-la-la-la)
(da-ra-da) but
I should be able to change the world inside you
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and withering
Because not a single thing can be missing (da-ra-da-da)
If you can smile at me in the end
That is enough for me
i'll always be by your side
